sizing_rule.note: Unit conversion rule for points-to-dollar basis for Optimal f calculation. Formula: Trade_Dollar_Value = Trade_Points × Dollar_Per_Point. Optimal f parameters marked as AUTHOR_SILENT—requires empirical derivation from trade distribution. This is a preprocessing step for optimal f sizing, not the sizing rule itself.

source_rule_text: Convert trade results from points to dollar values using a specified multiplier per point to establish position sizing basis.
